summary: UI Fix Verification for True Joy Birthing App - 3 icon/keyboard fixes verified in code

fix_1_eye_icon_profile.description: Changed app tour icon from help-circle-outline to eye-outline

fix_2_keyboard_avoiding_view.description: Added KeyboardAvoidingView wrapper to Daily Check-in modal

fix_3_paper_plane_send_button.description: Send button uses paper-plane icon (was already correct)

additional_fix_applied.issue: paper-plane icon was not mapped in Icon component
additional_fix_applied.fix: Added paper-plane mapping to Send Lucide icon

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 UI fixes correctly implemented in the codebase
paper-plane icon mapping was missing in Icon.tsx - fixed by adding mapping to Send icon
KeyboardAvoidingView properly wraps the wellness check-in modal content
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 UI fixes verified: eye-outline icon on profile, KeyboardAvoidingView in wellness modal, paper-plane icon on send button. Added missing paper-plane icon mapping to Icon.tsx.
ui_testing_notes: Playwright UI testing encountered difficulty with Expo/React Native web authentication flow. Login form was visible but submit button click timing issues prevented full navigation testing. Code review verified all fixes are correctly implemented.
